subject: Re: can WARP remove gold fiducials?
body:
Thanks Lorenzo,

I just realized actually we are running 1.0.9.   Where can I download 1.1?  
Is that the nightly build on the download page?

Anyways, GoldNet worked beautifully. I no longer have fiducials, I really 
appreciate your help!  

best

Jesse

On Wednesday, October 25, 2023 at 11:29:30 AM UTC+2 Warp wrote:

> Hi Jesse,
>
> That won't work, because warp does not *remove* the fiducials from the 2D 
> preprocessed data; it just uses the masks to mask that are during 
> reconstruction of tomograms and subtomograms.
>
> But maybe if you generate the masks, then you don't need the network 
> anymore and you can actually do the rest in 1.1? I'm not sure, you'd have 
> to try, but my gut says it will complain :P
>
> If you do go about retraining following the guide, it would be awesome if 
> you could share the network through zenodo like Alister did for GoldNet on 
> 1.0.9 :) We can add a link to it on the guide then!
>
> Best,
> Lorenzo
>
> On Wed, Oct 25, 2023 at 11:09 AM mrJ <bluu...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi Lorenzo,
>>
>> wow!   Thanks so much!  I was about to use imod's find beads 3D, then 
>> subtract from the raw frames, then reimport into WARP.  Seems like a pain.
>>
>> We are using the latest version of WARP though.  Would it work to also 
>> install ver 1.0.9 then load the current session into there, do the gold 
>> processing, then close 1.0.9 and continue in 1.1?   Otherwise I will just 
>> try to retrain using the steps below? 
>>
>> http://www.warpem.com/warp/?page_id=137
>>
>> thanks again, I really appreciate it
>>
>> Jesse
>>
>> On Wednesday, October 25, 2023 at 10:32:54 AM UTC+2 Warp wrote:
>>
>>> Hey Jesse,
>>>
>>> We have a nice little guide over at 
>>> https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/2d-preprocessing.html 
>>> where you can find some info about this. If you switch to the `Fiducials` 
>>> tab in the text, you'll see how to use GoldNet to mask out fiducials in 
>>> reconstructions.
>>>
>>> Note that this works with 1.0.9, not 1.1, for which you'd have to 
>>> retrain the network.
>>>
>>> Best,
>>> Lorenzo
>>>
>>> On Wed, Oct 25, 2023 at 10:29 AM mrJ <bluu...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>>
>>>> hi all,
>>>>
>>>> Just wondering if there is any way to remove gold fiducials in WARP?  
>>>>
>>>> Currently the gold is disrupting template matching in the tomograms.
>>>>
>>>> thanks!
>>>>
>>>> Jesse
>>>>
